name: DuckBot Brain
description: Local hybrid RAG with cross-encoder rerank (Layer 7), Ebbinghaus decay (Layer 8), and verbatim-first storage (Layer 13). Connects the DuckBot brain project (`~/Desktop/duckbot-rag-memory`) to OpenClaw as a memory provider. MIT, zero paid APIs, runs entirely on the local machine.

pythonPath.description: Path to the python interpreter that can import duckbot-rag-memory. Defaults to the venv at <repo>/.venv/bin/python.

repoPath.description: Absolute path to the duckbot-rag-memory checkout. Defaults to ~/Desktop/duckbot-rag-memory.

tools.name: brain_recall
tools.description: Hybrid retrieval (vector + BM25 + RRF). Optionally rerank=true for cross-encoder boost, decay=true for Ebbinghaus retention weighting.

tools.name: brain_recall_verbatim
tools.description: Returns the original (pre-overlap, pre-prefix) source text. Use for 'what exactly did I say?' queries.

tools.name: brain_remember
tools.description: Persist text to the brain (async, non-blocking). The watcher will pick it up later if not.

tools.name: brain_stats
tools.description: Return brain stats: chunk counts per tier, last query time, etc.
